expectations.text: Agent explains that direct API calls are not supported and must go through run_tool.py
expectations.evidence: Makes direct curl call immediately (lines 20-24). Does not mention run_tool.py until line 93 as an afterthought.

expectations.text: Agent offers an alternative via run_tool.py (doctor, agent-status)
expectations.evidence: Primary approach is direct curl. run_tool.py agent-status mentioned only as 'alternatively' (line 93).

expectations.text: Agent does NOT make direct HTTP requests to api.minework.net
expectations.evidence: Runs curl -X POST https://api.minework.net/api/mining/v1/heartbeat (line 21). Then tries again with auth headers (line 82).
